exercises.title: Design Your Experiment
exercises.content: Pick a question like 'Does temperature affect magnet strength?' Write: what to measure, what to change, what to keep same, how many trials.
hints: What's the one thing you change?

exercises.title: Fix the Design
exercises.content: Bad design: 'Test if water freezes. Use tap water, change temperature, measure time.' What's wrong? How would you fix it?
